# Feature Template

```markdown
## Problem Statement
> Single comprehensive sentence/paragraph that answers:
> - Who's struggling? (specific persona or user type)
> - What are they trying to accomplish? (workflow or business outcome)
> - What's going wrong today? (beyond "feature doesn't exist")
> - Do we have quantifiable indicators? (drop-off rates, support tickets, ARR impact, time wasted, etc.)
>
> Example: "Marketing and communications managers are unable to configure clear, meaningful communication preferences for their audiences because preferences are tightly coupled to Projects, forcing unrelated concepts into one system and making email setup confusing and inflexible. This creates friction in campaign setup and introduces revenue risk, impacting customers representing over $410k in ARR."

## Description
> Current state (when relevant), what this feature aims to achieve and why it matters (1-2 sentences)

## User Stories

<!-- USER STORY FORMAT GUIDE:
- Standard stories (with UI requirements): Use normal title format
- System-only stories (no UI requirements): Prefix title with "⚙️ [SYS]"
- Within each story, separate User Requirements from System Requirements
-->

<details><summary>As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]</summary>

**User Requirements** *(requires design)*
- [ ] User can [specific action]
- [ ] User sees [specific feedback/state]

**System Requirements** *(no design needed)*
- [ ] System [validates/processes/stores something]
- [ ] System [triggers backend action]
</details>

<details><summary>⚙️ [SYS] As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]</summary>

**System Requirements** *(no design needed)*
- [ ] System [validates/processes/stores something]
- [ ] System [triggers backend action]
</details>

## Cross-Feature Integration
[Include only sections with content - omit N/A sections]

**Person Records:**
[Details if applicable]

**Segmentation & Targeting:**
[Details if applicable]

**Reporting & Analytics:**
[Details if applicable]

**Billing & Credits:**
[Details if applicable]

**CRM Integration:**
[Details if applicable]

**Campaign Goals:**
[Details if applicable]

**Other Platform Touchpoints:**
[Details if applicable]

## Implementation Notes
> Technical guidance, constraints, or considerations (optional)

## Stakeholders
-

## Additional Context
> Links to designs, related issues, or background info (optional)
```
